description: Letter from Neḥemya ha-Kohen, Gaʾon of Pumbedita, probably to the Babylonian community in Fustat. Dated: Kislev 1274 Sel. = November 962 CE. Asks for financial assistance to the academy. Mentions the death of the writer’s brother Ḥofni, Av Bet Din of the academy. Reflects tensions between different factions within the academy. Polemicizes against "Kaḥshon and Shevira" i.e. Naḥshon and Sherira (b. Ḥananya, the future Gaʾon). He complains that his former letter had been disregarded, and requests to show honour to his messenger, Shelomo b. ʿEli, known as b. Ṭavnay. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, p. 54 and from the Bodleian Genizah site). On verso, a different hand identified the writer of the letter and copied a short phrase from the letter.
description_he: מכתב מנחמיה הכהן גאון פומבדיתא, נובמבר 962, מבקש סיוע כספי לאקדמיה, על מות אחיו חופני
